seo.title: Wholesale Faux Neon Channel Letters — EdgeLuxe LP 11-N | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale faux neon block acrylic channel letters. LED-powered neon tube simulation in solid acrylic. IP67, German-engineered. Trade pricing for sign shops only.

de.title: Großhandel Faux-Neon Leuchtbuchstaben — EdgeLuxe LP 11-N | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Großhandel Faux-Neon block acrylic Leuchtbuchstaben. LED-powered neon tube simulation in solid acrylic. IP67, Mit deutscher Ingenieurskunst. Händlerpreise for Schilderwerkstätten only.

data.subtitle:
The classic neon aesthetic, reimagined in solid block acrylic. The EdgeLuxe LP 11-N uses precision-routed channels and embedded LEDs to simulate the warm glow of traditional neon glass tubes — without the fragility, high voltage, or maintenance.

German-engineered precision. IP67 sealed. Wholesale direct to sign shops across the USA and Canada.

de.subtitle:
The classic neon aesthetic, reimagined in solid block acrylic. The EdgeLuxe LP 11-N uses precision-routed channels and embedded LEDs to simulate the warm glow of traditional neon glass tubes — without the fragility, high voltage, or maintenance.

Deutsche Ingenieurs-Präzision. IP67 sealed. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten across the USA und Kanada.

items.title: Neon Tube Simulation
items.description: Precision-routed channels simulate the classic neon glass tube look using modern LED technology. All the charm, none of the fragility.

items.title: Classic Neon Aesthetic
items.description: Captures the warm, authentic glow of traditional neon signage without the high voltage, gas tubes, or maintenance costs.

items.title: IP67 Sealed
items.description: Epoxy-sealed block acrylic construction rated IP67. Fully waterproof and dust-proof — unlike traditional glass neon.

items.title: Full Color Range
items.description: Available with any Pantone-matched color. Pigmented translucent acrylics create vivid, neon-style color effects.

items.title: Precision Engineering
items.description: German-engineered to minimum 12mm stroke width with uniform light distribution simulating a continuous neon tube.

items.title: Zero Maintenance
items.description: No gas refills, no transformer replacements, no broken tubes. IP67 sealed construction requires zero maintenance.

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Built to meet and exceed industry standards. Every specification reflects our commitment to quality and longevity. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.

de.heading: Handelsspezifikationen
de.description: Gebaut um Branchenstandards zu erfüllen und zu übertreffen. Jede Spezifikation spiegelt unser Engagement für Qualität und Langlebigkeit wider. Exklusiv zu Großhandelspreisen verfügbar.

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Faux neon channel letters bring the timeless appeal of traditional neon to any venue that values atmosphere and aesthetic. Wholesale direct to sign shops for all project types.
